subcodes.first_line: O ye people of the Kingdom! The letter ye have written after the feast of Naw-Ruz
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اهل ملکوت نامه ای که بعد از جشن نوروز مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید فرح و سرور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @suffering and imprisonment, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement
